topbar.right: WPA Card • Membership • Access • Verification • Future benefits

brand.title: World Protocol Academy
brand.subtitle: Institute for Protocol, Diplomacy, Public Communication & Security Studies

hero.title: We do not close knowledge. We build a premium layer around it.
hero.text: WPA Card is the future membership, access and verification layer of World Protocol Academy. The core academic content remains public for authority, trust and Google visibility, while WPA Card adds a premium experience, certificate traceability, member status and future benefits.
hero.note: Strategic principle: open content for authority building + premium membership for added value.

access.label: Access strategy
access.title: Open authority + premium upgrade.
access.text: WPA should not look like a closed website. It should look like a serious institution with public knowledge, then offer membership, certificates, verification and additional tools for users who want more.

card1.title: Books and papers as public trust
card1.text: Publications and scientific papers build WPA's academic weight. They attract Google, institutions, students and partners.

card2.title: WPA Card adds value
card2.text: WPA Card is not a hard block. It is an upgrade: member status, controlled access, premium materials, learning record and future benefits.

card3.title: Ready for QR and certificates
card3.text: The future system can connect membership, certificates, programmes and verifiable records through a QR/serial verification model.

tiers.label: WPA Card tiers
tiers.title: Four practical membership tiers for growth.
tiers.text: These tiers are defined as an institutional model. Prices, terms and technical activation can be defined later.

free.text: Basic public access to open pages, publications, papers, introductory information and public WPA resources.

pro.text: For professionals, students and users who want structured learning, premium resources and future WPA Card benefits.

academic.text: For teachers, researchers, libraries, students and academic collaborators who use WPA as a research and teaching foundation.

institutional.text: For institutions, organizations, teams, embassies, training centers, public services and corporate protocol environments.

notice.title: Important legal and institutional note
notice.p1: WPA Card is a concept for a membership, access and verification layer within World Protocol Academy. It is not a state license, university degree, public document or automatically recognized professional license.
notice.p2: The value of WPA Card comes from a clear programme, membership status, structured academic content, certificate logic, future benefits and transparent verification within the WPA system.

cta.title: Next move: CTA layer for books and papers.
cta.text: Open publications build trust. WPA Card turns that trust into membership, learning, verification and future premium value.

footer.title: World Protocol Academy
footer.text: Independent digital academy and professional platform focused on protocol, diplomacy, public communication and security studies.
